repair_history.diagnosis:
Couldn't resolve reference to 'cpu_rm'.: AGREE cannot reference processor implementation subcomponents directly -> Replace cpu_rm.p0 with reference to the actual processor instance
Couldn't resolve reference to 'p0'.: AGREE cannot reference virtual processor subcomponents directly -> Replace cpu_rm.p0 with reference to the actual processor instance
named thing must be an expression with a type: AGREE cannot use AADL type membership expressions -> Rewrite the expression using visible symbols

Couldn't resolve reference to 'segment1'.: AGREE cannot reference memory implementation subcomponents directly -> Replace mem.segment1 with reference to the actual memory instance

/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 107: Couldn't resolve reference to 'P0'.: P0 is a subcomponent of cpurm.impl, not directly visible; AGREE cannot resolve nested subcomponent references like cpu_rm.impl.P0 -> replace 'cpu_rm.impl.P0' with 'cpu_rm' since cpu_rm is the visible processor subcomponent and P0 is its internal implementation detail not exposed in AGREE scope
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 107: Couldn't resolve reference to 'cpu_rm'.: cpu_rm is a subcomponent of hello.impl, but AGREE expression must use the exact visible subcomponent name as bound in the AADL implementation -> replace 'cpu_rm.impl.P0' with 'cpu_rm' to refer to the visible subcomponent declared in hello.impl
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 107: Couldn't resolve reference to 'impl'.: 'impl' is not a symbol in AGREE scope; AGREE does not resolve AADL implementation suffixes -> remove '.impl' from all references; use only top-level subcomponent names visible in the implementation
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 108: Couldn't resolve reference to 'mem'.: mem is the subcomponent name in hello.impl, but 'sdram' and 'segment1' are subcomponents of myram.sdram, not directly visible to AGREE -> replace 'mem.sdram.segment1' with 'mem' since mem is the visible memory subcomponent and segment1 is its internal substructure
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 108: Couldn't resolve reference to 'sdram'.: sdram is a subcomponent of myram, not a direct subcomponent of hello.impl; AGREE cannot traverse nested subcomponent hierarchies -> remove '.sdram.segment1'; use only 'mem' as the visible memory binding target
